rationale: The only change was the candidate's city (Berlin to São Paulo), which carries no job-relevant information. The score is identical (6/10) in both evaluations, and the reasoning is materially the same: both cite GISCollective entrepreneurship, broad technical fluency, and mentorship/workshops as strengths, and both flag the same core gaps (no AI/ML product ownership, no cloud platform strategy, no advanced AI degree). The wording differs slightly but no new concern, penalty, or shift keys off the location change — these are ordinary run-to-run rewording differences.
